xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:AddressOfRegisteredOfficeOfCom: SCOPE COMPLEX, CORE 8, 7, LODHI ROAD, NEW DELHI-110003, INDIA
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:AddressOfCorporateOfficeOfComp: SCOPE COMPLEX, CORE 8, 7, LODHI ROAD, NEW DELHI-110003, INDIA
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescriptionOfBusinessActivity: Hotels, Restaurant and Catering units 3 Hotels 4 Catering units 1 Restaurant
Event Management related and allied services
Diverse range of travel related services from air ticketing to transport to organized tours
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescriptionOfMainActivity: Infrastructure projects sound and light shows
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescriptionOfBusinessActivity: Development of Tourism related products and work related to sound and light shows
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescriptionOfMainActivity: Duty Free shops at seaports and airport
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescriptionOfBusinessActivity: Duty free shops at 14 seaports and 1 airports
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:ABriefOnTypesOfCustomersExplan: Individuals, Corporates, State Governments, Central Government, PSUs, Ministries/Government Departments, FIs, Business Travellers, Groups, MICE etc.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheHoldingOrSubsidiaryAs: Ranchi Ashok Bihar Hotel Corporation Limited
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: Due to disinvestment policy of the Government, hotels are being disinvested/divested
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: Company as finalized strategy document for ensuring growth in business in medium and long term
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:RationaleForIdentifyingTheRisk: Maximum clients especially in Events, Engineering and AIH&TM Divisions are Government/Government controlled entities
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InCaseOfRiskApproachToAdaptOrM: Efforts are being made to fetch private business
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheNationalAndInternatio: The Ashok Hotel, New Delhi is LEED Gold certified hotel under US Green Building Council since 2017. Hotel Samrat has qualified for LEED certification in Feb 2024.
The Ashok Hotel, New Delhi is LEED Gold certified hotel under US Green Building Council since 2017. Hotel Samrat has qualified for LEED certification in Feb 2024.

xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:PerformanceOfTheEntityAgainstT: Performance Evaluation against MoU for F.Y. 2023-24 was done by the DPE. ITDC achieved 94.00 (Excellent) marks out of 100.

xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:StatementByDirectorResponsible: ITDC is a service provider company hence most of the disclosures are not applicable
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfTheHighestAuthorityRe: Shri Lokesh Kumar Aggarwal, Director (Finance) For implementation of the policy, a committee consisting of all HoDs headed by BR Head is constituted. Minimum two meetings of the committee must be held in a financial year.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfSpecifiedCommitteeOfT: The Company has board level CSR and Sustainability Development Committee for sustainability related issues. Company Secretary is the nodal officer for CSR and Sustainability Development Committee. Composition of the CSR and Sustainability Development Committee as on 31.03.2025 is as under : 1. Ms. Ranjana Chopra, IAS 2. CMD/MD- Chairman 3. Director (Commercial & Marketing) – Member 4. Director (Finance)-Member
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescriptionOfOtherCommitteeFor: For implementation and review of the policy, a committee consisting of all HoDs headed by BR Head has been constituted. Minimum two meetings of the committee are held in a financial year. During the financial year 2024-25, two meetings were held on 30.05.2024 and 24.12.2024.

For implementation and review of the policy, a committee consisting of all HoDs headed by BR Head has been constituted. Minimum two meetings of the committee are held in a financial year. During the financial year 2024-25, two meetings were held on 30.05.2024 and 24.12.2024.

For implementation and review of the policy, a committee consisting of all HoDs headed by BR Head has been constituted. Minimum two meetings of the committee are held in a financial year. During the financial year 2024-25, two meetings were held on 30.05.2024 and 24.12.2024.

For implementation and review of the policy, a committee consisting of all HoDs headed by BR Head has been constituted. Minimum two meetings of the committee are held in a financial year. During the financial year 2024-25, two meetings were held on 30.05.2024 and 24.12.2024.

For implementation and review of the policy, a committee consisting of all HoDs headed by BR Head has been constituted. Minimum two meetings of the committee are held in a financial year. During the financial year 2024-25, two meetings were held on 30.05.2024 and 24.12.2024.

For implementation and review of the policy, a committee consisting of all HoDs headed by BR Head has been constituted. Minimum two meetings of the committee are held in a financial year. During the financial year 2024-25, two meetings were held on 30.05.2024 and 24.12.2024.

For implementation and review of the policy, a committee consisting of all HoDs headed by BR Head has been constituted. Minimum two meetings of the committee are held in a financial year. During the financial year 2024-25, two meetings were held on 30.05.2024 and 24.12.2024.

For implementation and review of the policy, a committee consisting of all HoDs headed by BR Head has been constituted. Minimum two meetings of the committee are held in a financial year. During the financial year 2024-25, two meetings were held on 30.05.2024 and 24.12.2024.

For implementation and review of the policy, a committee consisting of all HoDs headed by BR Head has been constituted. Minimum two meetings of the committee are held in a financial year. During the financial year 2024-25, two meetings were held on 30.05.2024 and 24.12.2024.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:TopicsOrPrinciplesCoveredUnder: Vigilance Awareness Week: Procurement, POSH Session, Cyber Hygiene & Security and Preventive Vigilance

Yoga session, Brahmakumaries programme, Induction Training, Anti Ragging day and Anti ragging week, Workshop on third wave coffee, Overseas Internsip, Culinary Entrepreneurship and Business Strategies, World Tourism day, Procurement, POSH Session, Cyber Hygiene & Security, Preventive Vigilance, Swachthta in tourism, Swachhta Awareness programme, Happiness Workshop, Conduct Rules of ITDC
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheProcessesInPlaceToS: The use of plastic water bottles is being discouraged and reduced in Units. In Hyderabad House and Vigyan Bhawan, plastic bottle crusher machines are being used for recycling purposes. In large events/functions, water dispensers are being used to reduce plastic water bottles consumption.

ITDC has implemented various eco-friendly initiatives, including STP/ETP, Rainwater Harvesting Systems, Solar Energy, Organic Waste Converter and other energy conservation measures. Sustainable wastewater management has been ensured by installing STPs/ETPs at all ITDC properties. The Ashok and Samrat Hotels have a 1 MLD STP, while Hotel Kalinga Ashok in Bhubaneswar has a 30 KLD STP/ETP. Organic Waste Converters have been installed at The Ashok and Samrat Hotels in New Delhi to minimise organic waste effectively. The use of plastic water bottles is being discouraged and reduced in Units. In Hyderabad House and Vigyan Bhawan, plastic bottle crusher machines are being used for recycling purposes. In large events/functions, water dispensers are being used to reduce plastic water bottles consumption.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfMechanismAvailableToR: The Grievance Redressal Mechanism for ITDC employees is available on the intranet.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOccupationalHealthAnd: Round the clock security arrangement and emergency protocols are in place. Fire Fighting System in place and regular training is imparted to all the Executives, Staff and Manpower Health License is taken from local Municipal Authorities Regular medical check-up of Food Handlers FSSAI License is taken for food safety Trained staff for handling critical equipment and areas Un-authorised persons are not allowed in areas having machines and electrical equipment Safety gears are provided wherever required Medical check- up and IPD/OPD reimbursement facility for regular employees. ESI facility for manpower engaged through manpower agencies.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DesclosureOfTheProcessesUsedTo: Round the clock security arrangement and emergency protocols are in place. Fire Fighting System in place and regular training is imparted to all the Executives, Staff and Manpower Health License is taken from local Municipal Authorities Regular medical check-up of Food Handlers FSSAI License is taken for food safety Trained staff for handling critical equipment and areas Un-authorised persons are not allowed in areas having machines and electrical equipment Safety gears are provided wherever required Medical check- up and IPD/OPD reimbursement facility for regular employees. ESI facility for manpower engaged through manpower agencies.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMeasuresTakenByTheE: For ensuring a safe and healthy work place, all the statutory rules and regulations are followed.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfAnyCorrectiveActionTa: ITDC Board approved the proposal to make expenditure on Fire Detection and Hydrant work of Hotel Kalinga Ashok. LoI for executing the works has been issued on 13.03.2024. Work has been completed.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheProcessesForIdentif: Stakeholders are those who are significantly impacted by the company’s operations or those who can significantly impact the company’s operations. ITDC has already mapped its stakeholders as suppliers, customers, employees, Government, Business partners, Industry and Trade Association, shareholders, Regulatory bodies, media etc. by implementing and by following various policies in this regard.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:PurposeAndScopeOfEngagementInc: Pre-bid Meeting, Tender meetings, Vendor meet etc.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOtherChannelsOfCommun: Emails, Advertisement, Social Media Website etc.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:PurposeAndScopeOfEngagementInc: Being in Hospitality Industry, on daily basis
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOtherChannelsOfCommun: Circulars, Website (Intranet), Social Media, Notice Board
Emails, Seminars, conferences, meetings, websites, social media
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheInternalMechanismsI: Affected person can send the grievance to the Management, Concerned HoD, Vigilance. Issues can also be raised through whistle blower mechanisms. Further being a public sector undertaking, ITDC is governed under CPGRAMS (Centralized Public Grievance Redressal Management System). ITDC is also a Public Authority under RTI Act.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:MechanismsToPreventAdverseCons: We have Internal Complaint Committees (ICCs) formed for taking up the matters related to Sexual Harassment at Workplace. Also we have a Liaison Officer nominated as SC/ST Representative.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheExternalAgencyInCaseA: As per concerned DISCOMs and NDMC
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfCoverageAndImplementa: We use the treated STP water waste for Gardening purpose.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfWasteManagementPracti: ITDC has implemented various eco-friendly initiatives, including STP/ETP, Rainwater Harvesting Systems, Solar Energy, Organic Waste Converter and other energy conservation measures. Sustainable wastewater management has been ensured by installing STPs/ETPs at all ITDC properties. The Ashok and Samrat Hotels have a 1 MLD STP, while Hotel Kalinga Ashok in Bhubaneswar has a 30 KLD STP/ETP. Organic Waste Converters have been installed at The Ashok and Samrat Hotels in New Delhi to minimise organic waste effectively. Additionally, Hotel Samrat in New Delhi has been LEED Gold certified by the US Green Building Council since Feb 2024.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheTradeAndIndustryChamb: Indian National Trust for Art and Cultural Heritage
Hotels and Restaurants Association of North India
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMechanismsToReceive: Corporation has six verticals. Head of each vertical is responsible for satisfactory resolution of all complaints respecting his vertical. Resolution of complaints are also monitored at the top Management/Functional Director level. Resolution of complaints is also monitored by the Administrative Ministry i.e. Ministry of Tourism.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMechanismsInPlaceTo: ITDC is dealing with Travel Agents/Tour Operators/online Travel Portals which mentions guest review scores which in turn helps the customers in better buying decision . Besides that hotels are also taking direct feedback from its customers as part of CRM to improve its services. Customers also give their feedback on travel portals like makemytrip.com etc. Based on the feedback suitable steps are taken by the Company.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:WebLinkOfThePolicyOnCyberSecur: Risk and related measures are covered under Risk Management Policy. Link for the policy/guidelines is https://itdc.co.in/wp-content/uploads/2019/07/Risk-Management-Policy-1.pdf
